# services.freeciv

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.freeciv`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.freeciv.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable freeciv. |
| `services.freeciv.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to enable opening the firewall for the port listening for clients. |
| `services.freeciv.settings` | `open submodule of (freeciv-server params)` | Parameters of freeciv-server. |
| `services.freeciv.settings.Announce` | `one of "IPv4", "IPv6", "none"` | Announce game in LAN using given protocol. |
| `services.freeciv.settings.Database` | `null or string` | Enable database connection with given configuration. |
| `services.freeciv.settings.Guests` | `boolean` | Whether to enable guests to login if auth is enabled. |
| `services.freeciv.settings.Newusers` | `boolean` | Whether to enable new users to login if auth is enabled. |
| `services.freeciv.settings.auth` | `boolean` | Whether to enable server authentication. |
| `services.freeciv.settings.debug` | `integer between 0 and 3 (both inclusive)` | Set debug log level. |
| `services.freeciv.settings.exit-on-end` | `boolean` | Whether to enable exit instead of restarting when a game ends. |
| `services.freeciv.settings.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Listen for clients on given port |
| `services.freeciv.settings.quitidle` | `null or signed integer` | Quit if no players for given time in seconds. |
| `services.freeciv.settings.read` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Startup script. |
| `services.freeciv.settings.saves` | `null or string` | Save games to given directory, a sub-directory named after the starting date of the service will me inserted to preserve older saves. |
